skills.name: fleetintel-orchestrator
skills.description: Coordinate FleetIntel MCP and BrazilCNPJ MCP for external-agent workflows. Use when the user asks broad commercial intelligence questions, wants account prioritization, asks what changed after the last sync, or needs a single answer that combines fleet behavior with CNPJ enrichment.

skills.name: fleetintel-analyst
skills.description: Analyze FleetIntel MCP data for buying signals, market share, new entrants, trend shifts, and company-level fleet behavior. Use when the user asks commercial or analytical questions focused on truck fleet movement in Brazil.

skills.name: brazilcnpj-enricher
skills.description: Enrich Brazilian companies with BrazilCNPJ MCP using CNPJ, socios, CNAE, and grupo economico data. Use when the user asks for cadastral validation, company profile, ownership structure, group discovery, or CNPJ-based follow-up on FleetIntel leads.
